## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the change locally.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] No secrets, subscription URLs, or private configs are committed.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots if applicable.
- [ ] Runtime or pipeline changes include tests if applicable.
- [ ] The change does not copy GPL source code or assets from other projects.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Notes

Add any extra context for reviewers.
